name: zgame_options_load_cpu_vendor_string
description: zGame_OptionsRuntimeConfig::LoadCpuVendorString copies the CPUID vendor string into the runtime options block when CPUID is available.
known_limits: The smoke covers this function through zGame::Options_InitRegistryContext and verifies that the runtime config has a nonempty CPU vendor string.
The source now uses the distinct 0x4b2fe0 runtime-options CPUID-support helper; binary-safe verification remains pending.
